commerce.def: 商業、貿易、交際人物 (單數)
commerce.ex: The city is a major center for global commerce.

commercial.def: 商業的、營利的、商業廣告的人的人物
commercial.col: commercial break, commercial flight, tv commercial
commercial.ex: A loud and noisy tv commercial interrupted the film.

commercialize.def: 商業化、使商品化的人的人
commercialize.ex: Many people feel that we commercialize Christmas.

commercially.ex: The new drug is not yet commercially available.

commingle.ex: It is illegal to commingle the company's funds.

commiserate.def: 憐憫、同情、慰問的人的人
commiserate.ex: I went to commiserate with him on his recent loss.

commiseration.def: 憐憫、同情、(複)慰問人物 (單數)
commiseration.ex: We offered our sincere commiserations to family.

commissar.def: 人民委員、(現)代表人物 (單數)
commissar.ex: The soviet commissar controlled the local output.

commission.def: 佣金、委任、委員會、正式委任的人的人的人
commission.col: out of commission (故障), sales commission
commission.ex: The large elevator is out of commission for repair.

commissionaire.ex: The hotel commissionaire opened the car door today.

commissioned.def: 受委任的、服役的人的人 (或物)
commissioned.ex: He is a highly respected commissioned officer.

commissioner.def: 專員、長官、委員的人物 (單數)
commissioner.ex: The high commissioner visited the small island.

commit.def: 犯(罪)、承諾、委託、撥(款)的人的人
commit.col: commit a crime, commit suicide, commit to memory
commit.ex: They decided to commit more money to research.

commitment.def: 承諾、保證、致力的人物 (單數)
commitment.ex: We have a firm commitment to help the poor people.

committed.def: 堅定的、承諾了的人的人 (或物)
committed.ex: They are in a very long and committed relationship.

committee.ex: The steering committee met to discuss the new plan.

committable.def: 可交託的、可犯罪的人的人物 (單數)
committable.ex: That is a committable offense under the new law.

committal.def: 關進(監獄、病院)、承諾的人物 (單數)
committal.ex: The committal of the suspect took several days.

commode.def: 洗臉台、五屜櫃、便盆人物 (單數)
commode.ex: The antique commode was made of dark solid wood.

commodious.def: 寬敞的、方便的人的人物
commodious.ex: They lived in a very commodious and airy apartment.

commodity.def: 商品、日用品的人物 (單數)
commodity.ex: Wheat is a basic commodity for the local people.

commodore.def: 海軍准將、隊長人物 (單數)
commodore.ex: The commodore led the small fleet into the harbor.

common.def: 共同的、普遍的、粗俗的的人物 (公)
common.col: common sense, in common, common ground, make common cause
common.ex: It's just common sense to wear a seatbelt today.

commonalty.def: 平民、大眾、全體人物 (單數)
commonalty.ex: The rights of the commonalty were finally secured today.

commoner.ex: The prince married a wealthy local commoner today.

commonly.ex: It is commonly known that smoking is bad for you.

commonplace.def: 平凡的、家常便飯的人人物 (平)
commonplace.ex: Mobile phones have now become truly commonplace.

commons.ex: The bill was passed by the House of Commons today.

common-sense.ex: We need a common-sense approach to the problem.

commonwealth.def: 共和國、聯邦、國民的人物 (單數)
commonwealth.ex: The British Commonwealth held a meeting in London.
